login.title: Spotify Skip Tracker
login.subtitle: Connect your Spotify account to see your skip statistics.
login.footer: Spotify Skip Tracker & Coach · Personal dashboard

app.error: Could not load data. Check that the Flask server is running.

empty.heading: Tracker is ready
empty.description: No plays have been logged yet. Play some music in Spotify — the tracker will automatically record what you listen to and what you skip. Data will appear here after your first listening session.
empty.step1: Play a song in Spotify — on any device.
empty.step2: Skip the song before it ends — the tracker detects the skip automatically.
empty.step3: Come back here after a few songs — statistics update in real time.

sectionToggle.weekdayRateChart: Skip rate by day of week

statCards.totalSkippedTooltip: Total number of songs you have skipped since tracking started.
statCards.skipRateTooltip: Proportion of plays that were skipped before the song ended.
statCards.playsLoggedTooltip: Total number of plays recorded — includes both completed listens and skips.
statCards.uniqueSkippedTooltip: Number of unique songs you have skipped at least once.

nowPlaying.offlineBanner: Cannot reach server — showing last known data.
nowPlaying.idle: Play music in Spotify to see what's playing now.
nowPlaying.skipRateLow: You usually listen to this song all the way through

mostCompleted.heading: Songs you almost never skip
mostCompleted.subtitle: Tracks you usually listen to all the way through.

autoSkip.heading: Auto-skip candidates
autoSkip.subtitle: Songs with a high enough skip rate that Smart Skipper would skip them automatically.
autoSkip.empty: No candidates — no songs exceed the {{pct}}% threshold yet.
autoSkip.dryRunTooltip: Disable dry-run mode to enable automatic skipping
autoSkip.activeTooltip: These songs will be skipped automatically
autoSkip.disabledTooltip: Enable Smart Skipper to activate automatic skipping

heatmap.heading: Skip activity last year
heatmap.headingTooltip: Shows your daily skip rate in a calendar heatmap. Colour indicates the proportion of songs skipped, not the raw count.

charts.contextEmpty: No data for this filter yet.

hourly.title: Skips by time of day
hourly.empty: No data yet — tracker is collecting data in real time.

weekday.title: Skip count by day of week
weekday.empty: No data yet — tracker is collecting data in real time.

hourlyRate.title: Skip rate per hour of day

weekdayRate.title: Skip rate by day of week

skipTrendChart.heading: Skip rate over time
skipTrendChart.headingTooltip: Weekly skip rate for the last 16 weeks. Dashed line = overall average. Amber line = 4-week moving average.
skipTrendChart.notEnoughDataDetail: Needs at least 3 weeks of recorded activity

listeningScore.label: Listening score

scoreMessage.s90: Fantastic — you are an extremely patient and dedicated listener.
scoreMessage.s80: Very good! You almost always listen to your music all the way through.
scoreMessage.s65: Pretty good, but you skip more than average on some days.
scoreMessage.s50: You're in the middle — a bit chaotic, but there are days you're patient.
scoreMessage.s35: You skip a lot during the day. Maybe time for a Janitor clean-up?
scoreMessage.s0: High skip rate and low consistency — your playlists might need a thorough Janitor review.

listeningScore.explanation: Your listening score (0–100) is calculated from three components: completion rate (50%), longest consecutive streak without skipping (30%), and consistency in daily skip rate (20%). The score updates in real time as you listen.

coachInsights.label: Insights
coachInsights.explanation: The Music Coach analyses your listening patterns and gives you personalised insights based on historical data. Insights are shown at three levels: observation (what's happening?), context (what does it mean?) and explanation (why, and what can you do?).

smartSkipper.heading: Smart Skipper — control panel
smartSkipper.subtitle: Automatic skipping based on your historical skip data.
smartSkipper.error: Could not fetch Smart Skipper status.
smartSkipper.dryRunHint: Disable dry-run mode for real skips:
smartSkipper.toggleEnableDesc: Checks skip rate for each track and is ready to skip.
smartSkipper.toggleDryRunDesc: Logs suggested skips without actually skipping any tracks.
smartSkipper.configError: Could not save settings. Please try again.
smartSkipper.explanation: Smart Skipper uses your historical skip data to identify songs you consistently skip, and can automatically move to the next song after a configurable delay. Runs in dry-run mode by default — no real skips without your explicit activation.

playlistJanitor.heading: Playlist Janitor
playlistJanitor.subtitle: Songs you consistently skip — categorised by risk.
playlistJanitor.error: Could not fetch Playlist Janitor data. Run the analysis via CLI:
playlistJanitor.emptyCLIHint: Run the command below to analyse your playlists:
playlistJanitor.removeError: Could not remove the song. Please try again.
playlistJanitor.explanation: Playlist Janitor analyses your playlists and finds songs you consistently skip. The score (0–1) is calculated from skip rate, consistency, time since last completion, and number of plays. Songs you recently listened to in full will not be suggested for removal.

errorBoundary.heading: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: An unexpected error occurred. Reload the page to try again.

demo.banner: This is a demo with sample data. No changes are saved.
